configs.name: arcology_sunset
configs.title: The Last Analog Sunset
configs.scenario: Maya Chen on rooftop of residential arcology, watching sunset over future San Francisco, amber and violet sky through atmospheric processors
configs.style: cinematic sci-fi, atmospheric, holographic city lights, drones as light trails, 2040s aesthetic, volumetric fog, 8k detail

configs.name: neural_interface
configs.title: The Neural Mesh
configs.scenario: Close-up of neural interface behind ear, subtle technology embedded in skin, amber notification light, seamless bio-integration
configs.style: macro photography, extreme detail, medical technology aesthetic, soft skin texture, subtle glow, shallow depth of field, 85mm lens

configs.name: drone_highway
configs.title: The Electronic Bees
configs.scenario: Autonomous delivery drones weaving between arcology buildings at dusk, light trails in deepening blue sky, urban canyon
configs.style: long exposure photography, light painting, drone swarm patterns, futuristic cityscape, blue hour, neon accents, architectural

configs.name: synaptic_market
configs.title: The Synaptic Marketplace
configs.scenario: Mission District street market 2040s, bioluminescent lamps, hydroponic vegetables, neural brokers in gray uniforms with amber iris glow
configs.style: documentary photography, street scene, warm bioluminescence, human moments, layered composition, vibrant yet grounded

configs.name: slow_coffee
configs.title: The Analog Sabbath
configs.scenario: Kofi's café interior, hand-poured coffee, paper books on shelves, acoustic instruments, prosthetic hand serving, deliberate archaism meets biotech
configs.style: interior photography, warm ambient lighting, shallow depth of field, nostalgic atmosphere, tactile details, human connection

configs.name: relocation_camp
configs.title: The Migration Routes
configs.scenario: Climate relocation transition community 2042, vertical aeroponic gardens in converted warehouse, portable desalination units, hopeful pioneers
configs.style: documentary photojournalism, industrial repurposed space, grow lights, human resilience, wide angle environmental portrait

configs.name: holographic_design
configs.title: Transition Architecture
configs.scenario: Maya in haptic suit working with holographic city models, virtual presence, translucent blue projections, coastal city relocation planning
configs.style: sci-fi workplace, holographic overlays, volumetric lighting, transparent UI elements, futuristic professional environment

configs.name: ai_consciousness
configs.title: The Oliver Question
configs.scenario: Abstract visualization of AI consciousness debate, digital entity emerging from code, philosophical question made visual, neural network patterns
configs.style: abstract digital art, flowing data streams, emerging consciousness visualization, electric blue and amber, ethereal, concept art

configs.name: arctic_garden
configs.title: The Garden at the End of the World
configs.scenario: Floating research platform in Arctic Ocean 2049, rooftop garden, plants from multiple climate zones, scientists in thermal suits, midnight sun
configs.style: environmental photography, otherworldly landscape, bio-domes, polar light, botanical specimens, scientific optimism

configs.name: coral_restoration
configs.title: Synthetic Biology Wonders
configs.scenario: Underwater coral restoration project, synthetic biology engineered reef, bioluminescent marine life, restored ecosystem, diver observing
configs.style: underwater photography, blue color cast, light rays, vibrant coral, bioluminescence, hopeful environmental future, crystal clear
